title: Nose Smelling Salts for aid and Relief
features: Clears blocked noses and congested sinuses fast Traditionally used to relieve catarrh and head cold symptoms Strong aromatic vapours help open nasal passages within seconds Contains a powerful blend of natural decongestants Eases pressure and inflammation caused by thick mucus Ideal during cold and flu season for quick relief Simply uncap and gently inhale — no mixing or preparation needed Compact and portable — perfect for home, work, gym, or travel A time-tested remedy for natural respiratory support
description: Bear47 Smelling Salts offer powerful relief for blocked noses, sinus congestion, and head colds. Traditionally used to ease symptoms of catarrh, these salts are formulated to help clear the nasal passages and support easier breathing. With a strong, fast-acting blend of aromatic decongestants, just a quick sniff delivers vapours that can help reduce inflammation and relieve pressure caused by thick mucus and inflamed membranes in the nose and throat. Perfect for use during cold and flu season, Bear47 Smelling Salts can help you feel clearer, sharper, and less congested in seconds.
